title: Senior Doctor - B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates:
B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates!
